title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri.com - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
